description: Manage your personal preferences, sales pipelines, users, roles, AI, man-day roles, taxes, and audit log.

account.title: Account
account.languageSectionDescription: Choose your preferred UI language. The change applies across all your devices once you save.
account.saveFailed: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.

tax.title: Tax Settings
tax.subtitle: Default tax rate applied to new quotations
tax.description: Sets the default tax rate (%) applied to NEW Quotations. Existing quotations keep their own tax rate snapshot; sales reps can override per-quote when creating a new one.
tax.auditNote: Every save writes a SYSTEM_CONFIG_UPDATED audit event recording old and new values (12-month retention).
tax.saveFailed: Couldn't save tax setting. Please try again.

errors.rateInvalid: Tax rate must be a number between 0–100

tax.auditTrailLink: View audit log for this setting →

currency.title: Currency Settings
currency.subtitle: System default billing currency for new deals and quotations
currency.description: Default billing currency for new quotations, plus the two RMB-anchored exchange rates. Existing quotations keep their snapshotted HKD equivalent; changing these values does not rewrite history.
currency.defaultHelper: Default value for the Currency field on new quotations; sales reps can change it in the builder.
currency.auditNote: Every save writes a SYSTEM_CONFIG_UPDATED audit event recording currency_config's old and new values (12-month retention).
currency.saveFailed: Couldn't save currency settings. Please try again.

errors.rmbToHkdInvalid: RMB → HKD rate must be a number greater than 0
errors.rmbToMopInvalid: RMB → MOP rate must be a number greater than 0

currency.auditTrailLink: View audit log for this setting →

maintenanceFee.title: Maintenance Fee
maintenanceFee.subtitle: Default Maintenance Service rate applied when adding the +Maintenance line on a quotation
maintenanceFee.description: The "+ Maintenance Fee" button adds project subtotal × (rate ÷ 100) as a SERVICE-typed line item. The rate is snapshotted on the line at the moment of the click; later edits to other line items won't auto-update it. To recalculate, delete the existing fee line and click the button again.
maintenanceFee.name: Display name
maintenanceFee.saveFailed: Couldn't save maintenance fee setting. Please try again.

errors.rateInvalid: Maintenance fee rate must be a percentage between 0–100

maintenanceFee.exampleLine: Project subtotal = 100,000 × {{rate}}% = {{result}} (the unitPrice of the maintenance-fee line item)
maintenanceFee.auditNote: Every save writes a SYSTEM_CONFIG_UPDATED audit event recording old and new values. resourceId is maintenance_fee_rate.
maintenanceFee.loadFailed: Failed to load maintenance fee rate: {{message}}

pipelines.pipelineHelp: Drag rows to reorder. Edit name / probability / color, then click Save or Tab away to commit.
pipelines.noPipeline: No pipeline configured yet. Create one in the database seed.
pipelines.noStages: No stages yet. Click "Add stage" to create one.
pipelines.deleteBlockedBody: Stage "{{name}}" has {{count}} active deal(s). Reassign them to another stage in the Deals kanban first, then try again.
pipelines.deleteBlockedTitleAttr: Stage has active deals — delete blocked
